summary: Phase 3 testing of CitSpray OMS completed successfully. Backend tests: 23/23 passed (100%). Frontend UI tests verified all critical features including admin dashboard tabs, telecaller View All Orders toggle, packaging multi-select fields, courier dropdown, transport dispatch workflow, and order print functionality.
seed_data_creation: Created test customers and orders during backend testing, including order CS-0006 for UI testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 3 features fully tested: Admin dashboard merged with Orders view (has tabs: Orders, Sales Report, Executive Reports, Settings). Settings tab has global formulation toggle + packaging staff CRUD. Telecaller dashboard has View All Orders toggle (when ON, shows all orders with telecaller_name hidden). Packaging has 3 mandatory multi-select fields (Item Packed By, Box Packed By, Checked By) with staff names as buttons. Dispatch shows different fields based on shipping method (courier dropdown for courier, transporter name + LR for transport). Order print endpoint generates PDF. Executive Reports tab lets admin select telecaller to view their dashboard stats.
passed_tests: Admin login (admin/admin123)
Admin dashboard shows 4 tabs: Orders, Sales Report, Executive Reports, Settings
Orders table shows Executive column for admin
Settings tab - Global formulation toggle works
Settings tab - Packaging staff CRUD (add/remove names, default: Yogita, Sapna, Samiksha)
Executive Reports tab - Can select telecaller and view their dashboard stats
Telecaller login (tc1/test123)
Telecaller dashboard shows View All Orders toggle
Telecaller cannot see Executive column when viewing all orders
Create Order page - Courier shipping shows dropdown (DTDC, Anjani, Professional, India Post)
Create Order page - Transport shipping shows Transporter Name field
Create Order page - All 5 shipping methods available (Transport, Courier, Porter, Self-Arranged, Office Collection)
Packaging dashboard shows orders with Pack button and Print button
Packaging dialog shows 3 mandatory multi-select fields (Item Packed By *, Box Packed By *, Checked By *)
Packaging staff names appear as selectable buttons
Packaging dialog has Formulation History button
Mark as Packed requires all 3 fields to be filled
Dispatch dashboard shows Shipping method and LR No. columns
Dispatch dialog for Transport shows Transporter Name and LR Number fields
Order print endpoint returns application/pdf
Order Detail page shows Print button for admin/packaging roles
Order Detail page shows telecaller name for admin
API: /api/courier-options returns [DTDC, Anjani, Professional, India Post]
API: /api/packaging-staff returns default staff list
API: /api/orders/formulation-history/{customer_id} returns previous formulations

mocked_apis.gst_verification: /api/gst-verify/{gst_no} - basic format check only, not live API
